legal.privacyText:
This privacy policy explains how the Omadoma website collects, uses, and protects users' personal data.

1. Data we collect

We only collect data that the user voluntarily provides:
- name (if provided)
- phone number or email address
- other information entered in the form
- selected language (for communication purposes)

We may also collect technical data (e.g. via cookies) to improve website performance and user experience.

2. Purpose of data usage

Collected data is used to:
- contact the user
- provide services and respond to inquiries
- tailor communication based on the user's language
- analyze statistics and improve our services

3. Data retention

Personal data is stored only as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes described above or to comply with legal obligations.

4. Data sharing

We do not sell or share personal data with third parties, except when:
- it is necessary for providing the service
- it is required by law

5. User rights

Users have the right to:
- access their personal data
- request correction or deletion of their data
- restrict data processing

To exercise these rights, please contact us via email.

6. Data security

We apply reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect personal data from unauthorized access, alteration, or disclosure.

7. Changes

We reserve the right to update this privacy policy at any time. Updates will be published on the website.
legal.cookiesText:
The Omadoma website uses cookies to ensure a better user experience and to collect anonymous statistics.

What are cookies?
Cookies are small text files stored on a user's device when visiting a website.

What cookies do we use?
- Essential cookies – ensure basic website functionality
- Analytical cookies – help us understand how users interact with the website
- Preference cookies – store user preferences such as selected language

Purpose of cookies
Cookies are used to:
- ensure proper website functionality
- improve user experience
- collect and analyze statistical data

Managing cookies
Users can control or delete cookies in their browser settings.
Please note that some website features may not function properly if cookies are disabled.

Changes
We may update this cookie policy from time to time. All changes will be published on the website.
legal.termsText:
These terms govern the use of the Omadoma website.

General provisions
By using the website, the user agrees to these terms.

Service description
Omadoma provides information about its services and allows users to submit inquiries via a contact form.

User obligations
The user agrees to:
- provide accurate and truthful information
- not use the website for unlawful purposes

Limitation of liability
We are not responsible for:
- temporary unavailability of the website
- technical errors
- any damages resulting from the use of the website

Intellectual property
All website content (texts, design, visuals) belongs to Omadoma and is protected by copyright.

Changes
We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. The updated version will be published on the website.

Applicable law
These terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Estonia.
